reasoning: Query in German asks specifically for indoor rainy-day attractions in Hiroshima beyond Peace Museum. reasoning: Query targets experiential (体験型) family spots. canonical_family_friendly cluster fires (RULE E +1 intent/specificity) but spots[] is empty — min_quality filter dropped all hits. reasoning: Cluster fires with Tateyama Kurobe Alpine Route + Kurobe Dam + Yuki-no-Otani + Kurobe Gorge (RULE E +1 intent/specificity). Municipal spots include the route official page + transit info. Comprehensive answer enabling agent to describe the route.
